title: Card Request
description:
The payment card to use to fund a payment. Can be a credit or debit card.
Note: Passing card number, cvv and expiry directly via the API requires PCI SAQ D compliance.
*PayPal offers a mechanism by which you do not have to take on the PCI SAQ D burden by using hosted fields - refer to this Integration Guide*.

vault_id.description: The PayPal-generated ID for the saved card payment source. Typically stored on the merchant's server.

network_token.description: A 3rd party network token refers to a network token that the merchant provisions from and vaults with an external TSP (Token Service Provider) other than PayPal.
